holdings.infoBox: URA is an equity ETF with a total of 56 individual holdings. The top holdings are CAMECO CORP stock at 23.35%, Oklo Inc. at 6.89%, NexGen Energy at 6.16%, Uranium Energy at 5.16%, and Sprott Physical Uranium Trust Fund at 4.60%.

overview.description: The Global X Uranium ETF (URA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of companies involved in uranium mining and the production of nuclear components. URA was launched on Nov 4, 2010 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Solactive Global Uranium & Nuclear Components Index
